    Global Search Dialog
      1. About RWJF
      2. Careers

      Join RWJF

      Help make our vision a reality.

      The Robert Wood Johnson Foundation, located in Princeton, N.J., is a leading national philanthropy dedicated to taking bold leaps to transform health in our lifetime. We work side-by-side with communities, practitioners, and institutions to achieve health equity faster and pave the way together to a future where health is no longer a privilege, but a right.   

      If you are inspired by our purpose, join our dedicated team of passionate professionals and help make our vision a reality. 

      Our Guiding Principles

      We take bold leaps to transform health in our lifetime and pave the way, together, to a future where health is no longer a privilege, but a right. We take our responsibilities seriously, and pledge to work in ways that reflect our values. 

      OUR VISION

      RWJF is committed to partnering with others to achieve health equity—faster and together. With a career at the Foundation, you will help build a future where health is no longer a privilege, but a right. 

      We believe deeply in racial equity and are an equal opportunity employer. Diversity, equity, inclusion, and collaboration allow our staff’s wide range of experiences, passions, and perspectives to enrich our work and strengthen our ability to address our nation’s most pressing health issues. 

       

       

      General Employment Inquiries:

      Human Resources Center

      resume@rwjf.org

      All positions are assigned to our Princeton, N.J., HQ offices unless otherwise noted.

      As of January 1, 2023, the Foundation has implemented a model we call Hybrid: Flexible Purpose (HFP). RWJF’s innovative operating model is the infrastructure (e.g., policies, practices, protocols, procedures, systems) that forms the basis for how the day-to-day operations are managed, culture is built and nurtured, and mission is delivered.

      This model is designed to give employees as much flexibility as possible while meeting the needs of the organization.  

      Learn more about the Hybrid: Flexible Purpose Model

      Current Opportunities

      Please be aware of and alert to impersonating emails claiming to represent RWJF recruiters. Public email domains are not used at any stage of our hiring process.

      • Executive Assistant Operations 06/01/2026

      Why Work at RWJF?

      At RWJF, we take seriously our responsibilities, and we pledge to work in ways that reflect our Guiding Principles. These are rooted in equity and influence everything we do at RWJF. Diversity, equity, inclusion, and collaboration allow our staff’s wide range of experiences, passions, and perspectives to enrich our work and strengthen our ability to address the nation’s most pressing health issues.

      RWJF is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to fostering wide-ranging perspectives and actively pursuing equity in all aspects of our work. Our knowledgeable, passionate, and diverse team makes this possible.

      Read Our Commitment to Equity, Diversity, and Inclusion

      The Robert Wood Johnson Foundation offers competitive salaries and a sector-leading benefits program that reflects the Foundation's mission, vision, and values. Our benefits are designed to support the health and well-being of our staff.

      The Robert Wood Johnson Foundation provides:

      • A competitive salary
      • Comprehensive insurance coverage, including medical and dental (also covering domestic partners), life and accidental death, and disability, from first day of work
        • This link leads to the machine-readable files that are made available in response to the federal Transparency in Coverage Rule and includes negotiated service rates and out-of-network allowed amounts between health plans and healthcare providers. The machine readable files are formatted to allow researchers, regulators, and application developers to more easily access and analyze data.
      • A retirement savings plan, including generous employer contributions and the opportunity for your own tax-advantaged savings
      • Generous time-off benefits, including holiday, vacation, personal, and sick days
      • Employee assistance and referral programs
      • Tuition Reimbursement
      • Professional development initiatives for growth
      • Retiree health benefits
      • Matching donations to eligible non-profits
      • Free, healthy lunch at the Princeton office
      • Access to professional coaches

      • To make a lasting difference in your local community, statewide, and on a national level.
      • To connect with and learn from some of the country’s most innovative thought and health leaders.
      • To contribute to ideas and research that influence and shape the systems we live in and the policies that guide us, improving the lives of millions of people.
      • To grow as a person, as well as a professional.

      Our Commitment to Diversity & Inclusion

      RWJF is committed to transforming health in our lifetime. Achieving this goal requires focus on equity, diversity, and inclusion. Our Guiding Principles and Equity, Diversity, and Inclusion Commitment speak to our dedication to these important areas.

      OUR COMMITMENT

      Stay informed

      Sign up for the latest funding alerts, news, research, and perspectives from RWJF.

      Email address already subscribed

      Email address already subscribed. Please check your inbox to manage your subscriptions.

      Subscribed!

      Thank you. You are now subscribed.

      Are you an RWJF Grantee (Past or Present?)
      Are you a European Union Resident?
      Tell us what type of content you want to receive. Select at least one (required).

      Be informed with our twice a month newsletter updating you with relevant news and research around a Culture of Health, as well as the latest funding opportunities.

      Get funded by RWJF: Receive notifications when new funding opportunities are released.

      Receive monthly updates on RWJF-sponsored research that informs many robust health policy debates on Capitol Hill, covering topics like health equity, improving access to quality healthcare, equitable housing, and more.

      Shop talk for researchers. This monthly newsletter covers research news and opportunities from the Robert Wood Johnson Foundation.

      Communications expedite action. Get periodic research and expert insights on the best ways to communicate so we can spread what works.

      Sometimes we have news, announcements or opportunities that don't quite fit the subscription parameters above. If you're interested, we'll send you this information under "There's more...". *If you've indicated you are an EU resident, we will only send these communications if you intentionally check this box.

      Which profession or pursuit best describes you?
      Area(s) Of Interest
      Unsubscribe

      Stop receiving all emails from RWJF
